title: bidens hintonii
intro: Bidens hintonii, also known as Hinton's beggar ticks or Mexican beggar lice, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Bidens hintonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote healing, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory function. Bidens hintonii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
